pkgmetadata.longdescription: openEMS is a free and open electromagnetic field solver using the FDTD method. It supports Cartesian and cylindrical coordinates, multi-threading via OpenMP, SIMD acceleration, and a Matlab/Octave scripting interface for setting up simulations.
openEMS 是一款开源的电磁场仿真求解器，基于 FDTD 时域有限差分法， 支持笛卡尔与圆柱坐标系、OpenMP 多线程及 SIMD 加速，并提供 Matlab/Octave 脚本接口用于搭建仿真模型。

use.flag: Enable MPI support for distributed simulation
